one_time_description: Council of the Haida Nation transfer of $10,000,000 received in 2024 (nil in prior year)
economic_notes: Band controls Gwaalagaa Naay Corporation (carrying value $3,748,280), Haida Expeditions Ltd. ($43,427), and Taaw Naay Enterprises Ltd. (nil carrying value). Also has investment in Delmas Co-operative at cost $10,984. Band is guarantor of Band member mortgages to $8,061,482.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - Band has not identified ARO liabilities. Large one-time receipt of $10,000,000 from Council of the Haida Nation significantly inflated surplus. Band controls three entities (Gwaalagaa Naay Corporation, Taaw Naay Enterprises Ltd., Haida Expeditions Ltd.) carried as investments rather than consolidated. No schedule of remuneration provided. Ottawa Trust Funds ($1,073,130) held by ISC under the Indian Act included as restricted financial assets. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($14,568,093) + FNHA ($197,755) + Council of the Haida Nation ($10,000,000) + Parks Canada ($65,000) + Ottawa Trust Funds ($91,730) = $24,922,578; OSR = $33,827,954 - $24,922,578 = $8,905,376.
